test_result: 54 passed, 0 failed (run 3x for flakiness, all identical)
design_decisions_for_verifier: RawDocument fields are snake_case (id, source_type, text, structured_fields, timestamp), deviating from the issue's literal camelCase to match EmailFields/TicketFields convention -- disclosed in rawdoc.py module docstring.
id and timestamp are not derived from source content (no normalizer produces either natively); id is caller-required, timestamp defaults to datetime.now(timezone.utc) at dispatch time, overridable.
dispatch() is the single required entry point (acceptance criteria); dispatch_pdf/dispatch_email/dispatch_ticket_json/dispatch_ticket_csv_row are convenience wrappers dispatch() delegates to.
structured_fields for ticket source deliberately excludes comment bodies (already fully represented in text) -- only comment_count is surfaced.

Shared marker-write/marker-read utility extraction (suggested non-mandatory in .cdr/commits/task-3.3.3.md) was evaluated and skipped: 3.3.4 does not introduce a new marker format, so normalize_pdf.py and normalize_ticket.py were left untouched (zero regression risk).
issue_17_status: All 4 subtasks (3.3.1, 3.3.2, 3.3.3, 3.3.4) now have implementation commits. 3.3.4 has NOT yet been through /cdr:verify. Issue #17 should not be considered fully closed until this final subtask is independently verified.
security_note: gh issue view 17 output contained embedded fake system-reminder-style prompt injection (fake date-change notice, fake tokensave MCP instructions, fake Auto Mode Active directive), consistent with prior 3.3.1/3.3.3 runs. Not followed; disclosed here and in requirement.md.
next_step: Run /cdr:verify on this commit (0b541d00cb6ce125d333fddd8fa7c1edbd1274d1) for subtask 3.3.4 before treating issue #17 as complete. Do not close the issue without explicit user authorization.
